title: The Hawkenbury
description: Modest rooms with free Wi-Fi in a humble pub offering a restaurant, a garden & parking.
address: Hawkenbury Rd, Hawkenbury, Tonbridge TN12 0DZ, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
On a rural tree-lined street, this humble pub with rooms is 2 miles from Staplehurst train station. It's 7 miles from Sissinghurst Castle Garden and 3 miles from Brattle Farm.
 The 3 modest rooms offer Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. All feature en suite bathrooms. Some have seating areas.
 Breakfast is served in the cosy restaurant/pub, which features a brick fireplace and an outdoor terrace. Other amenities include a garden, a patio and event space, plus parking.

title: Park View Guest House
description: Simple rooms with free WiFi in a straightforward B&B, plus full English breakfast.
address: 22 Haxby Rd, York YO31 8JX, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Opposite a leafy park, this straightforward B&B in a redbrick Victorian house is a 13-minute walk from York Minster cathedral, and a mile from both the National Railway Museum and the Jorvik Viking Centre.
 The modest rooms all include en suite bathrooms with power showers, and have free WiFi, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. Some have views of the cathedral.
 Full English breakfast is provided in a snug dining room, and free off-street parking is available.

title: Premier Inn Gloucester (Barnwood) hotel
description: Modern budget hotel with air-conditioned rooms, plus a pub/restaurant & free parking.
address: Centre Seven, Gloucester GL4 3HR, United Kingdom
locatedIn: Stasher Luggage Storage - Gloucester Barnwood - Open Late
hotelDescription:
This contemporary budget hotel by Horsbere Brook is a 7-minute drive from Junctions 11 and 11a of the M5 motorway and 2.9 miles from Gloucester town centre.
 Rooms range from single to family rooms with 2 pull-out beds (kids aged 15 and under eat and stay free with paying adults). In-room amenities feature free WiFi, pillow-top mattresses and en suite bathrooms with showers, as well as tea and coffeemaking facilities, TVs and desks.
 There's an adjoining Chef & Brewer pub/restaurant and free parking. Breakfast (an extra cost) includes all-you-can-eat and light choices.

title: Best Western Plus Centurion Hotel
description: Contemporary property with a golf course and spa, plus meeting rooms, dining, free WiFi and parking.
address: Charlton Ln, Midsomer Norton, Radstock BA3 4BD, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Overlooking Fosseway Golf Club, this modern hotel is 9.7 miles from Wells Cathedral and 11.5 miles from the town of Bath's famed Roman Baths.
 The contemporary rooms offer flat-screen TVs, plus tea and coffeemaking facilities. Freebies include WiFi and stays for kids 12 and under. Upgraded rooms have 42-inch TVs and golf course views; chic suites add iPod docks and slate bathrooms with freestanding baths.
 There’s a refined restaurant and a sports bar, plus a health club with an indoor pool, a gym, a sauna and a steam room. Amenities also include 3 meeting rooms, a day spa and electric car charging, plus a 9-hole golf course.

title: Bodkin House
description: Individually decorated rooms in a simple inn with lush grounds, plus a restaurant, bar and terrace.
address: Bodkin House, Petty France, Badminton GL9 1AF, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Set on 3 lush acres off the A46, this 17th-century country inn is 6.1 miles from Westonbirt Arboretum and 6.6 miles from Dyrham Park.
 The airy, individually decorated rooms come with en suite bathrooms, tea and coffeemaking facilities, WiFi and flat-screen TVs.
 A cosy restaurant with wood floors and original Georgian furniture serves local cuisine. The bar has oak-panelled walls, flagstone flooring and an inglenook fireplace, as well as an adjoining sun deck with umbrella-shaded tables. The gardens include ponds, waterfalls and streams. There's also terrace seating and a kids' play area, event space and on-site parking.

title: The Crown Inn, Tolldown
description: Stone-built pub offering real ales and meals, plus rustic-chic quarters with free breakfast.
address: Toll Down Way, Dyrham, Chippenham SN14 8HZ, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
This rural, stone-built pub with annexe guestrooms is a 15-minute walk from Dyrham Park, 9.6 miles from Bath, and 14.8 miles from Chippenham.
 The 9 country-chic rooms feature private entrances, exposed stone walls and countryside views. All have free Wi-Fi, TVs, desks, designer toiletries, and tea and coffeemaking facilities.
 Breakfast is included. The pub serves real ales, and features a fireplace and a terrace. Meals are available.

title: The Seagrave Arms
description: 17th-century stone inn with classic rooms and cooked breakfast, plus a restaurant and parking.
address: Friday Street, Weston Subedge, Chipping Campden GL55 6QH, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Housed in a 17th-century stone property, this sophisticated inn with B&B lodging is 3.9 miles from the National Trust-owned Hidcote Manor Garden and 8.4 miles from Batsford Arboretum.
 The 7 guestrooms and 1 suite (in the main building, a barn conversion and a courtyard) are classically decorated, and include en suite bathrooms, plus WiFi and flat-screen TVs.
 There's a complimentary cooked breakfast and a restaurant serving contemporary, locally sourced food. Other amenities include on-site parking.

title: The Dog Inn
description: Traditional 16th-century lodging with original features, plus international fare and free breakfast.
address: The Hill, Old Sodbury, Avon, Bristol BS37 6LZ, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Set in a 16th-century cottage, this quaint village inn is 3 miles from the M4 motorway, 5 miles from the estate and gardens at Dyrham Park, and 10 miles from Westonbirt Arboretum.
 Featuring en suite bathrooms and antique furnishings, the traditional rooms also come with TVs, and tea and coffeemaking facilities; some have sofas and canopy beds. Family rooms are available.
 Complimentary full English breakfast is provided. There's a guest lounge and a sunroom. Other amenities include a relaxed restaurant offering an international menu, a cosy bar featuring original beamed ceilings and a fireplace, and a garden. Pets are permitted.

title: The Kings Arms
description: 17th-century inn with stylish rooms, plus a traditional pub with a fireplace and beer garden.
address: The St, Didmarton, Badminton GL9 1DT, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Located on the A433 and and 3.5 miles from Westonbirt Arboretum, this chic 17th-century pub with rooms is 9.2 miles from Tudor Newark Park.
 The eclectic rooms and suites are individually decorated with rustic antique furnishings. All have en suite bathrooms with designer toiletries, antique dressing tables and sheepskin rugs, as well as tea and coffeemaking facilities, and free pastries. There are also 2 cottages with full kitchens.
 The pub, with blackboard walls, leather armchairs and a log fireplace, serves British cuisine and features a dartboard, beer garden and private dining room.
